name: feature_001_cli_output_format
description: Extend the stats CLI with a csv output format that flows through argument parsing and shared formatting.
reference_solution_notes: Category rationale: this is small feature work because it adds a new supported output format end-to-end across CLI parsing, internal formatting, and result rendering. It is not a bug fix because no existing format is broken; the required behavior is net-new.
mutability_notes: Non-trivial because the new format must flow through parser choices, the shared formatter, and both visible and hidden CLI expectations.
